financeWelcome.title: Welcome to your finances
financeWelcome.intro: gigBuddy keeps your band's books with a full double-entry ledger — invoices, purchases, merch, VAT returns and reports, all in one place.

points.openingBalance: Set your opening balance so your bank total is right from day one.
points.profile: Add your financial profile (KVK, VAT number, IBAN) used on invoices and filings.
points.accounts: Review the default accounts your bookings post to.
